case_title: SMITH, ARLO HALE vs. PANCO AKA PANCO DEVELOPMENT INC. AKA PAN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF DEC-07-1995, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 998 ENTERED. IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED & DECREED THAT PLAINTIFF ARLO HALE SMITH & DEFENDANT PANCO AKA PANCO DEVELOPMENT INC. AKA PANCO PACIFIC OCEAN GROUP SHALL EACH RECOVER NOTHING ON HIS OR ITS CLAIMS HEREIN; EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR HIS OR ITS OWN COSTS & ATTORNEY'S FEES. CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED.
